description: Driver License Issuance — processes new and renewal driver license applications, validates identity documents, vision screening, and REAL ID compliance

hard_stops.label: Identity Documents Insufficient
hard_stops.logic: Applicant has not provided the minimum required identity documents per REAL ID Act (6 CFR 37) — cannot issue compliant credential

hard_stops.label: Vision Test Failed
hard_stops.logic: Applicant failed the vision screening test and no corrective lens restriction is acceptable — must obtain eye care professional clearance

hard_stops.label: Suspended or Revoked Status
hard_stops.logic: Applicant has a current suspension or revocation on their driving record — cannot issue until reinstatement is complete

soft_flags.label: REAL ID Upgrade Available
soft_flags.logic: Applicant is renewing a standard license and has documents sufficient for REAL ID — offer upgrade

soft_flags.label: Medical Review Needed
soft_flags.logic: Applicant is over 70 or has disclosed a medical condition — schedule medical review per state policy
